title: Supabase workflow triggers with undefined id
symptom: The workflow throws an error indicating that 'id' is undefined when trying to access it. This occurs even when a static id is set in the update.
not_this_if: The workflow does not involve any id properties
Realtime is switched off for the table
root_cause: The error occurs because a variable in a different workflow is inadvertently triggering the current workflow, leading to attempts to access an 'id' property on an undefined object. This can happen due to misconfigured workflows or unintended variable scope issues.
fix_steps: Identify the unrelated variable in the other workflow
Check for undefined before accessing the 'id' property
Test the workflow to ensure it no longer throws the error
agent_instruction: Check for undefined values before accessing the 'id' property in your workflow.
